en: Precautions ensuring immediate danger notification must be in place before alarm shutdown.\nWorkplace Ordinance, Section 12(2)
Alarm drills at least once per year during working hours must be conducted and recorded.\nWorkplace Ordinance, Section 12(3)

A compliant and clear escape route within 10 m of any workplace point must be ensured. Escape routes must remain unobstructed whenever employees are present.\nWorkplace Ordinance, Section 17(1)(1), 19(1)(4), 21(4)
Information on behavior in case of danger must be provided to employees.\nWorkplace Ordinance, Section 14(1)\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 46(3)

Proper maintenance and cleaning of emergency equipment must be ensured, along with regular condition checks of fire and rescue equipment, with prompt defect correction.\nEmployee Protection Act, Section 17(1-2)

Emergency lighting must support safe evacuation in darkness. Emergency lighting for work areas, high risk areas, and escape routes without sufficient natural light must be provided.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 6(5)\nWorkplace Ordinance, Section 9(1)(1-3)
